title: CNO Financial Group Declares $0.17 Quarterly Dividend and Announces Virtual Annual Meeting Date
author: Prnewswire
description: CNO Financial Group declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.17 per share payable on March 24, 2026. The company announced its annual shareholder meeting will be held virtually on May 12, 2026. Director Nina Henderson will retire from the Board at the conclusion of her current term, reducing the board size from ten to nine directors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement of a consistent quarterly dividend of $0.17 per share is a routine corporate action indicating stable capital management. The retirement of a long-serving board member is a normal governance transition with no indication of operational concerns. The virtual annual meeting is standard corporate practice. Overall, the news reflects normal business operations without significant positive or negative catalysts.

title: CNO Financial Group Announces Increase of Quarterly Dividend to $0.17
author: Prnewswire
description: CNO Financial Group announced a $0.01 per share increase in its quarterly dividend, marking the thirteenth consecutive annual increase. The company provides life and health insurance, annuities, and other financial services to middle-income Americans.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is increasing its quarterly dividend, which is a positive sign for shareholders and indicates the company's financial stability and growth.

title: CNO Financial Group Announces $500 Million Increase to Securities Repurchase Authorization and Declares $0.16 Quarterly Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: CNO Financial Group announced a $500 million increase to its share repurchase program and declared a $0.16 quarterly dividend. The company also announced the date for its virtual annual shareholder meeting.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is increasing its share repurchase authorization and declaring a quarterly dividend, which are generally viewed as positive actions for shareholders.
